taxonomy: Tragacantha xanthotrichos is classified within the family Fabaceae and belongs to the genus Astragalus. The species name xanthotrichos is derived from the Greek words 'xanthos' meaning yellow and 'thrix' meaning hair, referring to its yellow hairs. This classification places it among the legume family, which consists of plants that produce seed pods.
